excerpt: # Cortex v1 Architecture ## Goal Provide high-signal, repo-local context to coding agents without bloating instruction files. ## Pipeline 1. Ingestion: source files -> entities + relations 2. Storage: graph (RyuGraph) + optional vector index 3. Retrieval: semantic + graph 4. Policy: rules filter conflicts/deprecated/source-of-truth 5. Assembly: runtime context package for MCP tool responses ## Runtime Context Order 1. Task 2. Hard rules 3. Evidence blocks (top_k) 4. Uncertainties ## Guardrails -
